## [00:00 - 01:35]

Welcome to the scaling framework. So this is really the core of how you're going to go about growing your account hopefully you've been through the video on mindset and being in the right frame of mind and matching the strategy to your state of mind is crucial in being able to scale confidently and Profitably as well, and there are two key areas that I want to talk through when it comes into when it comes to scaling Vertical and horizontal scaling or as I call it v scaling and h scaling to keep it nice and catchy With v scaling what you're doing is taking your winning ad set and Incrementing the spend in a controlled way over a period of time and there's different strategies and ways of doing this but what you're doing is taking something that's working and Not modifying anything about it and scaling it as far as you can take it The h scaling strategy is slightly different where you take your winning ad set and you make duplicates of it changing certain parts of it to be able to a Scal your spend sideways a lot quicker But be also find new opportunities to improve your performance and we're in the in the section on scaling will define How to use vertical scaling how to use horizontal scaling? The kind of metrics that you're looking for and being able to build Confidence in your scaling strategies and use the right ones at the right moments in time as well
